channel.title: Seminars by Muhammad Yaseen
channel.description: Seminars and workshops by Muhammad Yaseen

item.title: Sampling Design & Analysis with Applications
item.dc:creator: Muhammad Yaseen
item.description:
Workshop

Sampling Design & Analysis with Applications will be held on 2022-08-19 at University of Agriculture, Faisalabad, Pakistan

 

All workshop material is avaiable here.

item.title: Statistics: The Art & Science of Learning from Data
item.dc:creator: Muhammad Yaseen
item.description:
Workshop

Statistics: The Art & Science of Learning from Data will be held on 2022-07-21 at University of Agriculture, Faisalabad, Pakistan

 

All workshop material is avaiable here.

item.title: In-Service Eight Weeks Mandatory Pre-Promotion Training Research Officer (BS-17) to Senior Research Officer (BS-18) 1st Session
item.dc:creator: Muhammad Yaseen
item.description:
Workshop

In-Service Eight Weeks Mandatory Pre-Promotion Training Research Officer (BS-17) to Senior Research Officer (BS-18) 1st Session held on January 19-20, 2021 & February 29, 2021 at Forest Services Academy Ghoragali, Murree, Pakistan.

item.title: In-Service Eight Weeks Mandatory Pre-Promotion Training Research Officer (BS-17) to Senior Research Officer (BS-18) 1st Session
item.dc:creator: Muhammad Yaseen
item.description:
Workshop

In-Service Eight Weeks Mandatory Pre-Promotion Training Research Officer (BS-17) to Senior Research Officer (BS-18) 1st Session held on January 19-20, 2021 at Forest Services Academy Ghoragali, Murree, Pakistan.

item.title: In-Service Eight Weeks Mandatory Pre-Promotion Training Research Officer (BS-17) to Senior Research Officer (BS-18) 1st Session
item.dc:creator: Muhammad Yaseen
item.description:
Workshop

In-Service Eight Weeks Mandatory Pre-Promotion Training Research Officer (BS-17) to Senior Research Officer (BS-18) 1st Session held on January 19-20, 2021 at Forest Services Academy Ghoragali, Murree, Pakistan.

item.title: Training Course on Capacity Building of NARS Scientists in Advance Analytical Techniques
item.dc:creator: Muhammad Yaseen
item.description:
Workshop

Training Course on Capacity Building of NARS Scientists in Advance Analytical Techniques held on October 27-29, 2020 at Ayub Agricultural Research Institute (AARI), Faisalabad , Pakistan.

item.title: Training Course on Capacity Building of NARS Scientists in Advance Analytical Techniques
item.dc:creator: Muhammad Yaseen
item.description:
Workshop

Training Course on Capacity Building of NARS Scientists in Advance Analytical Techniques held on November 25-28, 2019 at National Agricultural Research Centre, Islamabad, Pakistan.

item.title: Econometrics using STATA
item.dc:creator: Muhammad Yaseen
item.description:
Workshop

Econometrics using STATA held during July 29, 2019 to August 2, 2019 at National Institute of Banking & Finance (NIBAF), Karachi, Pakistan.

item.title: 1st International Workshop on Scholarly Writing and Publishing
item.dc:creator: Muhammad Yaseen
item.description:
Workshop

1st International Workshop on Scholarly Writing and Publishing held on March 18-21, 2019 at the University of Agriculture, Faisalabad, Pakistan.

item.title: Python: Programming for Statistics
item.dc:creator: Muhammad Yaseen
item.description:
Workshop

Python: Programming for Statistics will be held on February 18, 2019 at the Department of Statistics, Bahauddin Zakariya University, Multan, Pakistan.

item.title: An Introduction to Statistics using SPSS
item.dc:creator: Muhammad Yaseen
item.description:
Workshop

An Introduction to Statistics using SPSS will be held on August 16-17, 2018 at National Textile University, Faisalabad, Pakistan

 

All workshop material is avaiable here.

item.title: Emerging Technologies in Research: Google Apps and SPSS
item.dc:creator: Muhammad Yaseen
item.description:
Workshop

Emerging Technologies in Research: Google Apps and SPSS will be held on May 15-16, 2018 at Ayub Agriculture Research Institute, Faisalabad, Pakistan

 

All workshop material is avaiable here.

item.title: An introduction to R for Agricultural Research
item.dc:creator: Muhammad Yaseen
item.description:
Workshop

An introduction to R for Agricultural Research will be held on May 09-11, 2018 at Ayub Agriculture Research Institute (AARI), Faisalabad, Pakistan

 

All workshop material is avaiable here.

item.title: Structural Equation Modeling with Latent Variables using R
item.dc:creator: Muhammad Yaseen
item.description:
Symposium

Structural Equation Modeling with Latent Variables using R during Symposium on Professional Development of New Generation of Research Scholars held on December 14, 2017 at COMSATS Institute of Information Technology, Lahore, Pakistan

item.title: Applied Econometrics
item.dc:creator: Muhammad Yaseen
item.description:
Workshop

Applied Econometrics during Statistical Officers Training Scheme (SOTS-7) held on December 12-13, 2017 at National Institute of Banking & Finance (NIBAF), Islamabad, Pakistan

item.title: Statistical Methods for Researchers using R
item.dc:creator: Muhammad Yaseen
item.description:
Workshop

Statistical Methods for Researchers using R held on August 10-12, 2017 at the University of Agriculture, Faisalabad, Pakistan

item.title: Statistical Methods for Researchers using R
item.dc:creator: Muhammad Yaseen
item.description:
Workshop

Statistical Methods for Researchers using R held on August 07-09, 2017 at the University of Agriculture, Faisalabad, Pakistan

item.title: An Introduction to R & Bioconductor for Computational Biology & Bioinformatics
item.dc:creator: Muhammad Yaseen
item.description:
Workshop

An Introduction to R & Bioconductor for Computational Biology & Bioinformatics during one day international workshop on Application of Computational Biology in Biotechnology held on July 31, 2017 at National Institute for Biotechnology and Genetic Engineering (NIBGE), Faisalabad, Pakistan

item.title: An Introduction to LaTeX: UAF Synopsis and Thesis
item.dc:creator: Muhammad Yaseen
item.description:
Workshop

An Introduction to LaTeX: UAF Synopsis and Thesis held on July 26-28, 2017 at the University of Agriculture, Faisalabad, Pakistan

item.title: Statistics for Veterinary and Animal Science using R
item.dc:creator: Muhammad Yaseen
item.description:
Workshop

Statistics for Veterinary and Animal Science using R held on July 20-22, 2017 at the University of Agriculture, Faisalabad, Pakistan
